category.scope_note: Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, cellular, and IoT wireless device compliance comparison for export from China to Sudan under NCRTC oversight.

title.en: China-to-Sudan Wireless / IoT Device Compliance Gap Matrix (NCRTC / SSMO)
title.zh: 中国无线/物联网设备进入苏丹：NCRTC / SSMO合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國無線/物聯網裝置進入蘇丹：NCRTC / SSMO合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, and IoT device documentation against Sudan NCRTC mandatory type approval for radio and telecom terminal equipment, SSMO technical and EMC standards (SS series, largely IEC/ISO adopted), electrical safety requirements for 230 V / 50 Hz supply, local Sudanese authorized importer obligations, cybersecurity requirements under the Cybercrimes Act 2007, and applicable international sanctions considerations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国Wi-Fi、蓝牙及物联网设备文件与苏丹NCRTC强制型式核准（无线电及电信终端设备）、SSMO技术及电磁兼容标准（SS系列，主要采用IEC/ISO）、230V/50Hz供电电气安全要求、当地苏丹授权进口商义务、2007年网络犯罪法网络安全要求及适用国际制裁事项的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國Wi-Fi、藍牙及物聯網裝置文件與蘇丹NCRTC強制型式核准（無線電及電信終端裝置）、SSMO技術及電磁相容標準（SS系列，主要採用IEC/ISO）、230V/50Hz供電電氣安全要求、當地蘇丹授權進口商義務、2007年網路犯罪法網路安全要求及適用國際制裁事項的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, NCRTC type approval, legal opinion, customs determination, trade-sanctions clearance, or market-access approval. Sudan is subject to varying international sanctions regimes (US, EU, UN); exporters and importers must independently verify current sanctions status, export-control classifications, and obtain appropriate legal advice before any export, import, or sale of wireless or electronic devices in or to Sudan. Regulatory requirements described here are based on publicly available information and may not reflect the current state of Sudanese regulations, which can change without advance notice.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、NCRTC型式核准、法律意见、海关裁定、贸易制裁许可或市场准入批准。苏丹受不同国际制裁制度（美国、欧盟、联合国）约束；出口商和进口商在向苏丹出口、进口或销售无线及电子设备前，须独立核实当前制裁状态及出口管制分类，并获取适当法律建议。本页所述监管要求基于公开信息，可能不反映苏丹法规的现行状态，相关规定可能随时变更。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、NCRTC型式核准、法律意見、海關裁定、貿易制裁許可或市場准入批准。蘇丹受不同國際制裁制度（美國、歐盟、聯合國）約束；出口商和進口商在向蘇丹出口、進口或銷售無線及電子裝置前，須獨立核實當前制裁狀態及出口管制分類，並取得適當法律建議。本頁所述監管要求基於公開資訊，可能不反映蘇丹法規的現行狀態，相關規定可能隨時變更。

answer_first.en: NCRTC mandatory type approval is the primary gap for any wireless or telecom terminal device exported from China to Sudan. CE mark, FCC authorization, and CCC are not recognized by NCRTC; SRRC approval does not satisfy NCRTC requirements. Tests must be conducted at NCRTC-accredited or ILAC/MRA-recognized laboratories. A local Sudanese authorized importer or agent is required. Electrical supply is 230 V / 50 Hz with Type C and D plugs most common (Type G in some older buildings). Arabic-language documentation is often required. Critical note: Sudan is subject to international sanctions — exporters must verify current US, EU, and UN sanctions status and obtain export-control legal advice before proceeding.
answer_first.zh: NCRTC强制型式核准是中国出口至苏丹的任何无线或电信终端设备的首要差距。CE标志、FCC授权及CCC均不被NCRTC承认；SRRC批准不满足NCRTC要求。测试须在NCRTC认可或ILAC/MRA认可的实验室进行。须有当地苏丹授权进口商或代理。电源为230V/50Hz，最常见C型和D型插头（部分旧建筑为G型）。通常需要阿拉伯语文件。重要提示：苏丹受国际制裁约束，出口商在行动前须核实美国、欧盟及联合国当前制裁状态并获取出口管制法律建议。
answer_first.zht: NCRTC強制型式核准是中國出口至蘇丹的任何無線或電信終端裝置的首要差距。CE標誌、FCC授權及CCC均不被NCRTC承認；SRRC批准不滿足NCRTC要求。測試須在NCRTC認可或ILAC/MRA認可的實驗室進行。須有當地蘇丹授權進口商或代理。電源為230V/50Hz，最常見C型和D型插頭（部分舊建築為G型）。通常需要阿拉伯語文件。重要提示：蘇丹受國際制裁約束，出口商在行動前須核實美國、歐盟及聯合國當前制裁狀態並取得出口管制法律建議。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
